interpretation: The full-file interface solved the previous exact edit-plan materialization failure.
It did not solve the third-project opportunity problem: all generated youtube-dl candidates were correct-like.
The current evidence supports a two-project fresh hard-negative cohort plus documented source-acquisition failures, not a three-project verifier-ready realistic cohort.
recommended_next_step: Do not run verifier API. Decide whether to downgrade the paper claim to a two-project fresh hard-negative study or start a new source-acquisition protocol with different target tasks.
